prompt: Edit image 1 to overlay object detection bounding boxes and labels. Adopt a general detection visual style similar to environmental object detection (image 2). Apply a bounding box and label to the dog using a detection style influenced by the street scene objects (image 3). Add detection boxes and labels to the ribbons/award area based on the electronic item concept (image 4) and to the table/stand based on the household item concept (image 5). Include confidence score indicators near detected objects, inspired by the numbered tag in image 1.
prompt_refined: Modify `image 1` by adding object detection bounding boxes and corresponding labels. The overall visual style of the bounding boxes and labels should resemble the robust, real-world object detection aesthetics seen in `image 2`. Place a bounding box and label over the dog in the center of `image 1`. The detection style for the dog, including its box and label, should be influenced by the appearance of objects detected in a street scene, similar to the style found in `image 3`. Add a detection box and label to the blue and white ribbons and award items held by the woman on the left side of `image 1`. This detection element should reflect a clean, modern electronic device interface style, similar to that seen in `image 4`. Additionally, apply a detection box and label to the green table or stand supporting the dog at the bottom of `image 1`. This detection style should be inspired by the representation of a common household item, referencing `image 5`. For each detected object, include a clear confidence score indicator next to its bounding box. These indicators should visually resemble the simple numbered tag seen on the dog's leg in `image 1`, perhaps as a small, distinct numeric label.
objects: Original `image 1` content (people, dog, ribbons, green stand, background)
Bounding box over the dog in the center of `image 1`
Label for the dog's bounding box
Confidence score indicator next to the dog's bounding box
Bounding box over the blue and white ribbons and award items held by the woman on the left side of `image 1`
Label for the ribbons and award items bounding box
Confidence score indicator next to the ribbons and award items bounding box
